channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 58/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 58/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 13.5%.

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): John Healey resigns as defence secretary in disagreement with Starmer over defence spending – UK politics live
item.description: John Healey resigns as defence secretary in disagreement with Starmer over defence spending – UK politics live

item.title: Independent UK Politics: John Healey resigns from government over defence spending plan
item.description: John Healey resigns from government over defence spending plan

item.title:
Bluesky · @georgeeaton.bsky.social: “The truth is that ministers have not the faintest clue what to do”.
@gsoh31.bsky.social writes on the quiet collapse of Britain’s universities and why so few people seem to care. www.arguably.uk/p/the-quiet-...
item.description:
“The truth is that ministers have not the faintest clue what to do”.
@gsoh31.bsky.social writes on the quiet collapse of Britain’s universities and why so few people seem to care. www.arguably.uk/p/the-quiet-...

item.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: I think the key to understanding Starmer is that he believes a decision is tough and serious purely because he’s made it.
item.description: I think the key to understanding Starmer is that he believes a decision is tough and serious purely because he’s made it.

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Could this woman determine who will be Britain’s next prime minister?
item.description: Could this woman determine who will be Britain’s next prime minister?

item.title: Novara Media: Could This Gamble Kill the Labour Party?
item.description: Could This Gamble Kill the Labour Party?

item.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: All of this between Starmer *and* Burnham would be incredibly funny if we were starting our first year back in the comfort zone of opposition but....sorry brb just checking how best to protect my savings when Reform c...
item.description: All of this between Starmer *and* Burnham would be incredibly funny if we were starting our first year back in the comfort zone of opposition but....sorry brb just checking how best to protect my savings when Reform c...

item.title: The Guardian: Ministers want 60% of pupils in England ‘actively’ travelling to school by 2035 - The Guardian
item.description: Ministers want 60% of pupils in England ‘actively’ travelling to school by 2035 - The Guardian

item.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: One Starmer ally tells the FT: “Keir literally won by not being this version of the Labour party.” - Starmer's remaining allies dying as they lived, flatly in denial about how leftwing they are and how they won the 20...
item.description: One Starmer ally tells the FT: “Keir literally won by not being this version of the Labour party.” - Starmer's remaining allies dying as they lived, flatly in denial about how leftwing they are and how they won the 20...

item.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: Andy Burnham is sounding more and more like Starmer 2.0 - which increases the chances that 81 MPs will decide in the end to back a death or glory leadership challenge. Today's note:
item.description: Andy Burnham is sounding more and more like Starmer 2.0 - which increases the chances that 81 MPs will decide in the end to back a death or glory leadership challenge. Today's note:
